query: SELECT 'total' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans UNION ALL SELECT 'test_auto_generated' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain REGEXP '[0-9]{10,}' UNION ALL SELECT 'real_scans' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain NOT REGEXP '[0-9]{10,}';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT 'total' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans UNION ALL SELECT 'test_auto_generated' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain REGEXP '[0-9]{10,}' UNION ALL SELECT 'real_scans' as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain NOT REGEXP '[0-9]{10,}';
